'''Horob''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] research lab discovered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The planet was taken by the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Imperial Hazard]]''.<ref name="TCoIH" />

[[File:NeelaAndStasheffEscape-AJ10.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Sayer Mon Neela]] & [[Raan Stasheff]] escape hostile [[Horobian]]s during the [[Evacuation of Horob]].]]
